query:
SELECT 
  id,
  confirmToken,
  status,
  supplierNotes,
  confirmedAt,
  expiresAt,
  createdAt,
  supplierId,
  planId
FROM supplier_confirmations
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2oD5Rpux9cjqHPq.05f21cb26eb8 --database ZuNBVd6CLssbosJUyd9j6x --execute SELECT 
  id,
  confirmToken,
  status,
  supplierNotes,
  confirmedAt,
  expiresAt,
  createdAt,
  supplierId,
  planId
FROM supplier_confirmations
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;

rows.supplierNotes: 测试回复：大部分物料可以按时交付，A1300003电芯需要延迟3天交货。
